# Copilot instructions for `evanstern/coda`

This repo's contributor context lives in `AGENTS.md` at the repo
root. Trust AGENTS.md first for architecture, build, conventions,
traps, and review gates.

When AGENTS.md doesn't cover something, search the repo. If a
documented command actually fails, flag the drift in your PR
description so AGENTS.md can be updated.

Do not invent build steps, CI, Makefiles, lint configs, or coverage
gates unless a focus card explicitly requests them.
